mapper.sql: id, push_id, trace_id, task_id, document_id, config_id, target_system, service_code, service_name, push_method, trigger_type, idempotent_key, request_payload, response_payload, status, retry_count, max_retry, response_code, response_message, pushed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: select from downstream_push_record where task_id = #{taskId} order by pushed_at desc, updated_at desc
mapper.update: update downstream_push_record set target_system = #{targetSystem}, service_code = #{serviceCode}, service_name = #{serviceName}, push_method = #{pushMethod}, trigger_type = #{triggerType}, idempotent_key = #{idempotentKey}, request_payload = #{requestPayload}, response_payload = #{responsePayload}, status = #{status}, retry_count = #{retryCount}, max_retry = #{maxRetry}, response_code = #{responseCode}, response_message = #{responseMessage}, pushed_at = #{pushedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where push_id = #{pushId}
